### Flow Details

1. **Agent â†’ Execute â†’ Audit â†’ Cost**: Validates agent creation with RBAC/audit, execution with secrets injection, audit log persistence, cost ledger recording, and the full end-to-end flow.

2. **Provider â†’ Agent â†’ Execute**: Registers model providers (OpenAI, Anthropic) via ModelRouterService, creates agents referencing those models, and executes them with tenant-scoped credential injection.

3. **Template â†’ Agent**: Creates templates, instantiates them into draft agents, verifies definition/tag inheritance and usage_count increment, handles missing template edge case.

4. **DLP Integration**: Tests 4-layer scanning pipeline (regex secrets, NER PII, semantic classification, OPA policy), verifies AWS key detection, email/SSN PII detection, clean content passthrough, and DLP-gated execution flow.

5. **Lifecycle Pipeline**: Tests state machine transitions (draftâ†’reviewâ†’approvedâ†’published), deployment with rolling/canary/shadow strategies, pipeline promotion (devâ†’stagingâ†’canary), rollback, and RBAC enforcement.
